mapper.select: select a.id , a.site , a.address , a.alert_time , a.alert_level , s.water_quality_parameters , w.temperature , w.ph , w.dissolved_oxygen_concentration , w.turbidity, g.ammonia , g.sulfur_dioxide , g.hydrogen_sulfide , g.nitrogen_dioxide , g.carbon_monoxide, d.conductivity, a.longitude , a.latitude from address_data a , statistics s , water_data w , gas g , dissolved_oxygen d where a.site = g.site_id and a.site = s.site_id and a.site = w.site_id and a.site = d.site_id;
select id, site, latitude, longitude from address_data;
